item.title: Kingston XS2000 Draagbare SSD 1000G -SXS2000/1000G Solid State Drive
item.description: You’ve got Kingston XS2000 Draagbare SSD 1000G -SXS2000/1000G Solid State Drive at the following link: ℹ️: Capaciteiten tot 4 TB² IP55 rating⁴ met afneembare rubberen huls Toonaangevende lees-/schrijfsnelheden tot 2.000MB/s¹. Onderdeelnummer: SXS2000/1000G Compacte, zakformaat vormfactor Vereist compatibele apparaten om USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 USB-C Performance te bereiken¹. 🛒 Check the deal!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
